summary: The share of cases settled before their original hearing date jumped from the low 40s-50s percent range to 58% in fiscal 2025 and 68% in the first four months of fiscal 2026. DCWP attributes the increase to improvements to its web-based business portal, which now lets businesses enter settlement and pleading agreements online instead of only in person or by mail.

sources.label: DCWP, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
